assertions.description: PerformanceResourceTiming is the interface the contentType field is added to.
performance.getEntriesByType('resource') returns an array of resource entries.
When a resource entry exists, its contentType is a string (possibly empty when TAO is not granted).
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=performance.getEntriesByType('resource'); if(!e.length) return true; return typeof e[0].contentType === 'string' || e[0].contentType === undefined;})()

assertions.description: A same-origin fetch for a CSS resource produces a resource timing entry whose contentType matches the server Content-Type.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!('PerformanceResourceTiming' in window) || !('contentType' in PerformanceResourceTiming.prototype)) return false; performance.clearResourceTimings(); const url='/v148/content-type-in-resource-timing/mime-type-performance-analyzer/probe?kind=css&conformance='+Date.now(); await fetch(url,{cache:'no-store'}).then(r=>r.text()); const absolute=new URL(url, location.href).href; const entry=await new Promise(resolve=>{const deadline=performance.now()+1200; (function tick(){const match=performance.getEntriesByType('resource').find(e=>e.name===absolute); if(match || performance.now()>deadline) resolve(match || null); else requestAnimationFrame(tick);})();}); return !!entry && entry.contentType === 'text/css';})()
